steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || typeof preview.resetCounters !== 'function' || typeof preview.replaceFetchBehaviors !== 'function' || typeof preview.patchBuilderState !== 'function') { throw new Error('preview api unavailable'); } preview.resetCounters(); return preview.replaceFetchBehaviors([ { match: { type: 'chartquery' }, delayMs: 1200, result: { rows: [ { eventDate: '2026-05-01', channelV2: 'Alpha', avails: 111 }, { eventDate: '2026-05-02', channelV2: 'Beta', avails: 222 } ], hasMore: false } }, { match: { type: 'chartquery' }, delayMs: 5000, error: 'Active chart query failed.' } ]) > 0; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; return !!preview && Array.isArray(preview.fetchBehaviors) && preview.fetchBehaviors.length === 2 && preview.fetchBehaviors[0]?.match?.type === 'chartquery' && preview.fetchBehaviors[0]?.delayMs === 1200 && Array.isArray(preview.fetchBehaviors[0]?.result?.rows) && preview.fetchBehaviors[0]?.result?.rows?.length === 2 && preview.fetchBehaviors[1]?.match?.type === 'chartquery' && preview.fetchBehaviors[1]?.delayMs === 5000 && preview.fetchBehaviors[1]?.error === 'Active chart query failed.'; })()

window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__ && typeof window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState === 'function' && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState({ selectedMeasures: ['avails'], primaryMeasure: 'avails', selectedDimensions: ['eventDate', 'channelV2'], chartSpec: { title: 'Avails by Date and Channel', type: 'area', xField: 'eventDate', yFields: ['avails'], seriesField: 'channelV2' }, viewMode: 'chart', staticFilters: { dateRange: { start: '2026-05-01', end: '2026-05-04' } } })

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const starts = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'start').length; const endings = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && (entry.phase === 'success' || entry.phase === 'error')).length; return starts === 1 && endings === 0 && Array.isArray(preview.fetchBehaviors) && preview.fetchBehaviors.length === 1; })()

window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__ && typeof window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState === 'function' && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState({ selectedMeasures: ['hhUniqs'], primaryMeasure: 'hhUniqs', selectedDimensions: ['eventDate', 'channelV2'], chartSpec: { title: 'HH Uniques by Date and Channel', type: 'area', xField: 'eventDate', yFields: ['hhUniqs'], seriesField: 'channelV2' }, viewMode: 'chart' })

steps.expression: (() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const starts = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'start').length; const endings = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && (entry.phase === 'success' || entry.phase === 'error')).length; return starts === 2 && endings === 0 && Array.isArray(preview.fetchBehaviors) && preview.fetchBehaviors.length === 0; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder'); const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; const chartWrap = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__chart-wrap'); const chartText = chartWrap?.innerText || chartWrap?.textContent || ''; const current = { errorCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'error').length, successCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'success').length }; const settled = preview.__chartStaleSuccessActiveErrorCounts; const changed = !settled || settled.errorCount !== current.errorCount || settled.successCount !== current.successCount; if (changed) { preview.__chartStaleSuccessActiveErrorCounts = { ...current, lastChangedAt: Date.now() }; return false; } return current.errorCount === 0 && current.successCount === 1 && Date.now() - settled.lastChangedAt >= 350 && root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-state') === 'chart' && !text.includes('Refreshing report data') && !text.includes("We couldn't render these results") && !text.includes('Active chart query failed.') && chartText.includes('Display') && chartText.includes('CTV') && !chartText.includes('Alpha') && !chartText.includes('Beta') && !chartText.includes('Audio') && !chartText.includes('Social'); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const starts = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'start').length; const endings = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && (entry.phase === 'success' || entry.phase === 'error')).length; return starts === 2 && endings === 2; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const current = { startCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'start').length, errorCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'error').length, successCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'success').length, requestCount: (preview.fetchRequestHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery').length }; const settled = preview.__chartStaleSuccessActiveErrorSettledCounts; const changed = !settled || settled.startCount !== current.startCount || settled.errorCount !== current.errorCount || settled.successCount !== current.successCount || settled.requestCount !== current.requestCount; if (changed) { preview.__chartStaleSuccessActiveErrorSettledCounts = { ...current, lastChangedAt: Date.now() }; return false; } return Date.now() - settled.lastChangedAt >= 1200; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const startCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'start').length; const errorCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'error').length; const successCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery' && entry.phase === 'success').length; const requestCount = (preview.fetchRequestHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'chartQuery').length; return startCount === 2 && errorCount === 1 && successCount === 1 && requestCount === 2; })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder'); const header = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__result-header'); const headerText = header?.innerText || header?.textContent || ''; const frame = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__result-frame'); const frameText = frame?.innerText || frame?.textContent || ''; const chartWrap = frame?.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__chart-wrap'); return root?.getAttribute('data-report-builder-state') === 'error' && headerText.includes('HH Uniques by Date and Channel') && !headerText.includes('Avails by Date and Channel') && frameText.includes("We couldn't render these results") && frameText.includes('Active chart query failed.') && !frameText.includes('Alpha') && !frameText.includes('Beta') && !frameText.includes('Audio') && !frameText.includes('Social') && !frameText.includes('Display') && !frameText.includes('CTV') && !chartWrap; })()
